description: This video provides a comprehensive guide on trading perpetual futures contracts on the Binance platform, specifically focusing on the BTC/USDT pair. It covers account setup, transferring funds, understanding futures trading, and various order types including limit and stop limit orders.
topic_summary: Learn how to trade perpetual futures on Binance with a focus on BTC/USDT, including account setup, fund transfers, risk management, and order types [t=0:00-6:12].
